name: URBAN OUTFITTERS INC
business: Urban Outfitters operates through three segments: Retail (Anthropologie, Free People, FP Movement, Urban Outfitters brands selling apparel, accessories, home goods, and beauty), Subscription (Nuuly, a monthly women's apparel rental service), and Wholesale (Free People, FP Movement, Urban Outfitters brands sold to department and specialty stores worldwide). The company sells directly to consumers via retail stores, websites, mobile apps, and third-party digital platforms.
sellsTo: Franchisee-owned stores in the Middle East

exposures.sentence: We maintain a Data Privacy & Security working group that is responsible for setting data security and privacy policies, overseeing those policies, and tracking and reporting on data security and privacy performance.

Our distribution and fulfillment centers utilize computer-controller and automated equipment, which means the operations are complicated and may be subject to a number of risks related to security or computer viruses or malware, the proper operation of software and hardware, power interruptions or other system failures.
During 2025, the U.S. government enacted significant changes to its tariff regime that increased rates on a substantial number of imports.
Various governing bodies and regulators have been focused on Environmental, Social and Governance ('ESG') matters and related disclosures.

catalysts.event: Planned opening of 57 new Company-owned retail locations in fiscal 2027
catalysts.sentence: During fiscal 2027, we plan to open approximately 57 new Company-owned retail locations, expand or relocate certain existing retail locations, expand our fulfillment center network, invest in logistics capabilities, expand our home office to support our growing business, invest in new products, markets and brands, purchase inventory and rental product for our operating segments at levels appropriate to maintain our planned sales volumes, upgrade our systems, improve and expand our digital capabilities and invest in omni-channel marketing at appropriate levels.

catalysts.event: Purchase of Nuuly fulfillment center in Raymore, Missouri in March 2026
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate our capital expenditures during fiscal 2027 to be approximately $475 million which has increased from prior estimates primarily due to the purchase of our Nuuly fulfillment center in Raymore, Missouri in March 2026 that we previously leased.
